eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Kenosha, WI; at 9:44 AM on FEB 16, 2019 Effective until 9:59 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS A TEST. THE KENOSHA SHERIFF'S DIVISION OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT IS CONDUCTING AN EAS I PAWS ALERT. THIS IS ONLY A TEST. This is only a test.
